verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hear my cry, O God; Attend unto my prayer. From the end of the earth. will I cry unto thee,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When my heart is overwhelmed: Lead me to the rock that is higher than I.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For thou hast been a shelter for me, and a strong tower from the enemy.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When my heart is overwhelmed: Lead me to the rock that is higher than I. That is higher than I.
